highlights: Expanded from 54 to 94 tools — added Health (9 tools: body fat, ideal weight, water intake, sleep, macros, TDEE, running pace, ovulation, pregnancy) and Fun (8 tools: coin flip, dice, 8-ball, password generator, random name/number/team, shuffle) categories.
Extended Calculators (+7), Developer (+8), Text (+6), and Datetime (+2) tool sets.
